_note: Engineered image-gen prompts for every room/cyberspace bg id referenced in data/rooms/*.json and data/cyberspace/databases.json. Pipeline: same lineage as neuromancer-godot (pluto ComfyUI, RealVisXL/FLUX.2-Klein) but MODERN direction: clean full-res photoreal plates, no pixel crush. Rules applied (per CJ feedback on game I): engineer clean visual language, don't dump novel prose; NO text/signage (models can't spell); fog outside / clean inside; no gore (industrial wreckage OK, no viscera/bodies); environment-only plates — no rendered characters (dialogue is text-based; NPCs never appear in bg art); leave a clear navigable read on interiors. Target render size: 1920x1080 or 16:9 equivalent, clean crop-safe framing (this engine covers-crops to fill VIEW_W x VIEW_H).
style_prefix: photorealistic, cinematic film still, 35mm anamorphic, volumetric lighting, ultra-detailed, modern 2026 cyberpunk aesthetic, teal neon accent lighting, no people, unoccupied environment,
negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, signage, gibberish writing, subtitles, people, characters, human figures, faces, extra limbs, deformed hands, mutated anatomy, gore, viscera, blood, human heart, exposed organs, corpse, blurry, low quality, illustration, anime, cel shading, pixel art, out of frame, cropped, worst quality
cyber_style_prefix: Modern volumetric cyberspace, the Gibson matrix rendered as cinematic 3D: infinite black void gridded with glowing neon wireframe lines, electric cyan and teal, Tron-Legacy + Cyberpunk-2077 energy, no text/logos, 16:9 game plate,
cyber_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, gibberish writing, people, faces, blurry, low quality, flat colors, muddy

rooms.C1_bedroom: Whitewashed beach-house bedroom, slow ceiling fan, sun through louvered wooden shutters casting warm bar-shadows across rumpled white linen, salt-air haze, minimalist recovery-clinic calm, wide establishing shot, golden late-morning light
